strategy_doc_section_loaded: Homework: build and verify (M3) — Big Idea, Mood (deliberate), Hero move, Arc Logic M3 beat, The Two Questions, Continuous Artifact, What We Teach

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea match — implicit framing honours M3 Big Idea (live session gives shape; homework turns it into personal muscle memory)
Mood contract — capable-next-step framing present; opening connects to prior homework as natural continuation, not remediation
Mood contract — closing callout (LLM limitation + human oversight) does not flatten capable-next-step mood into completion or failure
Epistemic mood ≠ punitive — closing callout frames limitation as not-knowing, not having-done-wrong
Lead with discipline, not failure mode — 'Find the wrong claims' titles the detective skill, not a failure outcome; phases frame a disciplined loop
Strategy-fidelity — M3 Homework 2 hero move (source support + overreach) faithfully delivered; no front-running of downstream teaching moments
Two-questions alignment — exercise serves C-question (custodian identity: can you be trusted to run this?) without drifting to builder-leader scope
Not-remediation guard — opening presents exercise as continuation of prior homework, not corrective or extra credit
Continuous Artifact alignment — personal local folder, no shared/ or group-driver dependency
Hero move fidelity — strategy doc names source-support plus counter-evidence; exercise delivers source-support plus overreach check across a multi-pass loop; intent preserved
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts — exercise has no Key Concepts section
Key Concepts shape — exercise has no Key Concepts section
What You'll Learn shape — exercise has no What You'll Learn section
